ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position held by the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the faculty member is assigned */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the faculty member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the faculty member's account */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the faculty member's profile picture */,
  "cv" TEXT /* File path to the faculty member's CV */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Professor, Associate Professor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "graduate_school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate school where the department is located */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_graduate_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_school_id") REFERENCES graduate_schools ("graduate_school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduate_schools" (
  "graduate_school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the graduate school */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university where the graduate school is located */,
  "school_description" TEXT /* Description of the graduate school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduate_school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduate_schools_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "university_description" TEXT /* Description of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialization */,
  "specialization_category" TEXT /* Category of the specialization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specialization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specialization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specializations_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator of the project */,
  "project_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the research project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the research project */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the research project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member in the project */,
  "member_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the faculty member to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal or conference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member who authored the publication */,
  "publication_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "partner_institution" TEXT /* Name of the partner institution or industry */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., academic, industrial) */,
  "collaboration_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, faculty, staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
